name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Adds a Settings language selector for English, Mandarin Chinese, Hindi, Spanish, Arabic, Bengali, Portuguese, Russian, Japanese, and Turkish; defaults first install to the phone language when supported or English otherwise; localizes settings, status, overlay, and info-panel text; and adds a Celsius/Fahrenheit temperature-unit setting with Celsius as the default.
description: Visit Video Logger records driving or travel videos with a composed camera, map, GPS, heading, speed, timestamp, and optional front-camera picture-in-picture overlay. It includes stationary GPS/compass smoothing, camera-aspect-safe recording composition, rear driving camera controls, a black-screen recording mode, and readable location/story panels for travel narration.
